professionals.name: Erica Shea
professionals.title: Permanent Makeup Expert
professionals.description: Erica is a master of permanent artistry, and paramedical micropigmentation. She blends meticulous bespoke mapping to deliver sophisticated, natural-looking results. As the founder of her own PMU Academy, Erica is dedicated to elevating industry standards through both elite clinical practice and professional mentorship.

professionals.name: Kelsey
professionals.title: Hairdresser and blonding specialist
professionals.description: Kelsey is a qualified hairdresser and blonding specialist, as well as a certified Head Spa expert. She focuses on scalp health as the foundation for beautiful hair, delivering customized treatments that cleanse, hydrate, and restore-while providing a deeply relaxing experience.
professionals.imageAlt: Portrait of Kelsey, head spa specialist

professionals.name: Dani
professionals.title: Licensed esthetician & restoration specialist
professionals.description: Dani is a licensed esthetician and restoration specialist dedicated to the art of sculpted vitality and skin longevity within the Florida Gulf Coast community. Her philosophy centers on the "bespoke treatment," moving beyond standard protocols to curate high-performance rituals that unveil immediate luminosity and long-term dermal health. Specializing in advanced resurfacing, precision lash artistry, and artisanal permanent makeup, Dani marries meticulous technique with high-potency botanicals to deliver a consistently refined aesthetic. In a space defined by quiet luxury and clinical excellence, her focus is not merely on the service, but on the restoration of your most confident, vibrant self.
professionals.imageAlt: Dani performing a bespoke facial treatment for a client in the spa treatment room
